title: rubus macranthus
intro: Rubus macranthus, also known as the Large-flowered Raspberry or Tibetan Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus macranthus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as supporting the immune system. Rubus macranthus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies to make jams, jellies, and other culinary products.
